task_context.actionable_question: Is this student consistently submitting late and does it affect their score?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: State average delay and punctuality rate. Identify if late submission is systematic. Suggest deadline reminder or check-in.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: The student has consistently failed to submit assessments on time, as indicated by a punctuality rate of 0 across all assessments. This pattern suggests a systematic issue with submission behavior, which may negatively impact their overall engagement and performance.

Insights: Consistent Late Submissions: The student has not submitted any assessments by the due dates, resulting in a punctuality rate of 0 for all quizzes and the exam.

Educational implications: The lack of timely submissions may hinder the student's learning progress and understanding of course material.

Recommendations: high - Implement deadline reminders for upcoming assessments. - Regular reminders may help the student manage their time better and improve submission punctuality. | medium - Conduct a check-in with the student to discuss barriers to timely submissions. - Understanding the reasons behind late submissions can inform tailored support strategies.

evaluation_constraints.description: Do not characterise late submission as low motivation or a personal failing.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
